reviews.title: They refused to give me a room on the pretext that the hotel was full even though I had booked with them. I will file a complaint against the hotel. I will hire a lawyer in Denmark and I want a refund
reviews.text: They refused to give me a room on the pretext that the hotel was full even though I had booked with them. I will file a complaint against the hotel. I will hire a lawyer in Denmark and I want a refund of the reservation amount and the taxi fare that took me from Da nang to the hotel.

reviews.title: Nice overall
reviews.positives: room was VERY big, with two king beds (we were just 2 people). Very good location, quiet place at night. They let us refill our water bottles in their water fountain. There is a very good breakfast place right next to the homestay.
reviews.negatives: We asked the staff about a tailor and she took us to her mother's tailor. The lady was kind of annoying and wouldn't let us leave without getting our stuff done with her.

reviews.title: Not recomended
reviews.text:
Room was way overpriced.only 2 windows that opened onto the corridor.these windows had no curtain to block the night lighs.bed was rock hard.no fridge
No tv.no breakfast.one towel to share between 2 of us and that was torn  and threadbare.these people should not be in the hospitality business.when leaving they were not interested in looking at us or talking so we just left the key on the counter.so in my opinion don't stay there

reviews.title: Has very much potential, but the cocroaches and heat issue need to be thoroughly dealt with.
reviews.positives: The woman running it is very friendly and helpful, on the check out day she let us stay for a few hours in the lobby and stored our luggage, even valuables. She also let us leave stuff in her fridge. The room is very spatious, there are 2 queen beds which are very comfortable, a wardrobe, a fridge and a large fan. It's quiet and it stays dark, excellent for sleeping.
reviews.negatives: There is an insect problem in the whole compound. During our 2 night stay we had to eliminate 3 cocroaches. The host gave us a bug spray which was nice of her. But since there are no windows, and there are also cocroaches in the hallway we couldn't air out the spray, which is toxic. And these were some huge cocroaches, not only crawling but jumping as well. There were also some small ants on the second bed which got into my packing cube, even though we didn't keep any food in the room, not even snacks. The airco didn't work well, it took about and hour to start blowing cool air (did not depend on settings or malfunctioning remote, it was the airco). There was also a gekko in the room (thought in the given situation this was actually good as it eats small roaches and insects). The chairs in the lobby are incredibly uncomfortable. Waiting for 2 hours for the bus there was quite an unpleasant experience, and the older hostess gave us some unpleasant looks as if the wanted us to leave.

reviews.title: Regret
reviews.text:
My Fiancé and I booked for only one night,
but we end-up regretting staying here. Yes, it is located relatively close to the old town, and the cost is relatively low compared to some other home stays  in the area. However, I think sometimes it is best to pay the extra few bucks for piece of mind.

One of the Agoda selling points was a homestay breakfast...There was NONE.  A bit of false advertising, but that is not what really bothered us.

The BED sheets were not changed out as there was the scent...perfume/cologne...whatever it maybe, it belonged was clearly of the previous occupants. THERE was still bits of sand on the bed and there was hair on the pillow cases. We did not notice these things at first as we got back late at night. I was going to wake the family up, but my fiancé stopped me and convinced me otherwise. In sum, we did not want to stir up some trouble and ruin our time together in Hoi An.

Best advice, just stay away from this place.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very near to old town.Very cooperative owner who helped us with all the needs.Bike rental services are also available

reviews.title: 2/5 not far from Walking street
reviews.text: Toilet ceiling is broken. No free drinking water for room, big room but no window, can walk to walking street in 1.00km

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good location, large room and very friendly and helpful owner

reviews.title: אחלה
reviews.text: היה לנו נמלים על המיטה ובכל החדר שנכנסו לנו לדברים. החליפו לנו מצעים אחרי 2 לילות ושוב היה עוד נמלים. הנקיון של החדר לא וואו אבל יחסית למחיר אני לא ציפיתי למשהו יוצא דופן. אחלה מקלחת. נועלים את המלון בלילה, קצת לא נוח שיש מפתח אחד אם ישנים כמה אנשים.  נתקעתי מחוץ למלון כי לא הצלחתי לפתוח את כל הנעילות ולא היה מי שיענה לי ויעזור. מבחינת מיקות יחסית בסדר, לא קרוב כל כך ולא רחוק. חדרים מרווחים ומים חמים במקלחת.  יחסית בתמורה למחיר זה בסדר גמור הייתי מצפה לנקיון קצת יותר נורמלי.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Located in great spot.  Nice large room with comfy bed and clean linens. The room itself could use a bit of love, but clean and good to go.  The proprietress was amazingly kind and helpful.
reviews.negatives: Room smelled a bit musty, this went away when the AC ran.  Could use a coat of paint and such, would then increase rating.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The room is clean and cool. However, despite having air conditioning set to 16 degrees, it doesn't feel cool, only has a smell. There is also a large but low standing fan. The owner is nice and friendly. It's more than a kilometer from the old town. The room has a shower and a water heater, but it's not working. Only a low faucet allows water to run, but that faucet is too low for bathing. The room is spacious, but the parking space is too small; with almost ten bikes parked together, it's difficult to maneuver them down the step (there are cars in the yard making it cramped). When spending this amount of money, one should reconsider!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: very well located, close to the center and with great breakfast options nearby. Room is large with bathroom with extra shower!
reviews.negatives: Laundry 30K/kg, a bit expensive, but you get it back dry after a few hours.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The room is clean as a general impression. My room is right on the lower floor, so there's no need to walk far. However, it is very close to the owner's room, which makes it quite noisy. That morning, I was sleeping when the kids were chatting, joking around, and playing music... it was very disruptive (the room is not soundproof at all). I hope the owner pays more attention to this. Although it's close to the center and quite convenient, along with reasonable pricing!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
The staff is amazing!!
They were very nice to me, they helped me a lot!
The room was very clean!
I really recommend this homestay!!!

reviews.title: Note for customers traveling by car
reviews.text:
No entry for vehicles with more than 7 seats.  
I find it a bit difficult to enter and exit with a 7-seater car; the front yard is sufficient for parking 2 cars.  
For those who don’t drive, it’s also fine to stay here; it’s near the city center.

reviews.title: An excellent location and a really nice room.
reviews.positives: I loved that it was close to the historic downtown, but down a smaller street in an are that was less busy. We really enjoyed our stay here.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
מקום חמוד ממש, קרוב לרוב הדברים
הבאסה היחידה שהמשפחה כנראה גרה בקומה מתחת לחדרים שהם מארחים בהם וכל בוקר היינו שומעים את הילדים צועקים וקמים מוקדם, יש להם גם תוכי שלא הפסיק להשמיע קולות ולצעוק
תכלס אחלה מקום פשוט תישנו עם אטמי אוזניים

reviews.title: Comfortable lovely homestay near the center.
reviews.positives:
Family runs homestay a few minutes walk to the old town. 
The street has many  local eateries and morning market vendors. We loved  the atmosphere.
Our room  was upgraded to a large  very quiet family room with no extra cost,  which was  perfect for our 8 days in Hoi an.
Tiens, the lovely  owner, helped us with everything we needed, and we could use and share the well equipped family kitchen whenever we wanted.  
Highly recommended.
reviews.negatives: None. It was perfect for us.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
helpful staff let us in to the room 6am.. organised bikes for good price.. 
a bit noisy in the rooms at ground floor..

reviews.title: excellent
reviews.positives: all the people were so kind, the water was free, you could use the kitchen
reviews.negatives: everything ok

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: Early to bed, because early to rise
reviews.text:
If you are a light sleeper or like to sleep in, this may not be the place for you. There is a rooster nearby that starts making noise at 4:45am, and keeps at it for hours. 

Aside from that, it's pretty nice. Firm beds, but good shower, and the hotel has a washer AND dryer, so can wash your clothes for you quickly and affordably. There is rarely anyone at the front desk, though, so you're pretty much on your your own for most things. The A/C worked well, and the location is great - Hoi An is quite touristy, but although this place is close enough to easily walk to the old city and plenty of tourist-friendly restaurants, it's also in a more "normal" neighborhood which I liked. Also, being up a bit higher and away from the river, they told me it stayed dry during Typhoon Damrey.

reviews.title: Personal que estafa
reviews.positives: La ubicación y la limpieza.
reviews.negatives:
El personal. Nos intentaron cobrar 250 000 para alquilar una bicicleta un día cuando en otros alojamientos pagamos 25 000. 
Además, lavamos la ropa y también nos quiso cobrar un kilo de más y fingió que se había equivocado cuando nos negamos a pagarlo.
La cama es muy dura.

reviews.title: Real value for money
reviews.text:
Real value for money
Room was large,
2 king beds for 4 people. Only 20USD per night

Very good hospitality from owner, Trinh.
She can speak good english, no problem at all for communication.
Close enough to walk to old town

The only bad thing is room has some stuffy smell from moldy odor.

However, I will give 9 out of 10

reviews.title: No muy recomendable
reviews.positives: La zona donde esta es más tranquila y barata para comer que las calles centrales donde están todos los turistas.
reviews.negatives: La dueña no apareció ni cogió el teléfono hasta las 15:00 de la tarde y no podíamos hacer el checkin. Cuando cogió el teléfono dijo que estaba lejos y mandó a una persona a darnos la llave de la habitación. Era casi imposible contactar con ella por si tenías alguna duda o problema o incluso para alquilar una moto o hacer la lavadora. El baño tenía un agujero enorme en el techo y pelos por todo el suelo. La limpieza era muy pobre. No nos sorprendió porque no parecía haber nadie haciéndose cargo del alojamiento. El precio muy elevado para el servicio que ofrecen.

reviews.title: welcoming at its best
reviews.text: This has been the best homestay i've ever experienced.  The host and her family are phenomenally nice and welcoming.  I felt like I was at home.  Ask and you shall receive, don't be shy.

reviews.text: I stayed alone for one night for only 74 yuan, and the next day they allowed me to keep my car in the lobby until 10 PM. When they saw me playing on my computer in the lobby, they even helped me get a fan. It was great.

La cama era demasiado dura.
Es difícil que haya alguien en la recepción. hay que avisar a la mujer de la tienda de al lado la gran mayoría de las veces si necesitas algo.

reviews.title: Exceptional

The location is 600m-1000m from Tran Phuc, very convenient for travel. I stayed on the first floor, so there’s no view, the room is small but equipped with amenities, suitable for the price considering it was a Sunday night.

El último día también pudimos dejar nuestras mochilas allí después del check out, y nos dejó quedarnos en la recepción haciendo tiempo. La habitación era muy amplia, tenía aire acondicionado y ventilador, se estaba muy fresquito y cómodo.
reviews.negatives: Por decir algo diría que algunos de los enchufes no funcionaban muy bien, pero por la resta todo genial!

L'hôtesse n'est jamais présente pour nous renseigner. Notre chambre située à côté de la cuisine était très bruyante, nous avons été réveillées tous les matins par des bruits de vaisselle et a cause de la lumière du couloir (porte de chambre avec verre occultant).

reviews.positives: Personnel accueillant chaleureux et convivial, à l'écoute. Hôtel proche du centre propre et avec des services utiles.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The room was large, but there was a strong moldy smell on the walls. This is an average price for a room I've rented all over Vietnam, but this was the worst. I got a room on the ground floor, so it was very noisy, so keep that in mind. Overall, it's okay for a one-night stay, as the location is very good and the hostess was friendly. The noise and moldy smell are the biggest drawbacks.

L'hôtel est bien situé dans une rue calme avec de bons restaurants.

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.negatives: Personal schwer aufzufinden, Badezimmertür kaputt, Bad/WC Sauberkeit nicht zufriedenstellend, Bett extrem hart

reviews.title: Nehmt keinen Raum im Erdgeschoss
reviews.positives: Wir bekamen bei Ankunft ein größeres Zimmer ohne Aufpreis. Wir konnten schon früher einchecken.
reviews.negatives: Es gab eine Kakerlake im Bad! Die Decke im Bad hatte ein großes Loch. Morgens ab 5 war es kaum möglich zu schlafen, weil die Familie, die in der Unterkunft lebt, ganz schön Lärm gemacht hat.
